question: What is the purpose of the @RestController annotation?
options: To mark a class as a service component
To mark a class as a data-access component
To extract a value from the URL path

question: What is the purpose of the @RequestMapping annotation?
options: To set the HTTP response status code
To set the base URL path for the controller
To deserialize the JSON body into a Java object
answer: To set the base URL path for the controller

question: What is the default port used by Spring Boot?
Which database is used in the Spring Boot Quickstart example?
What is the purpose of the @PathVariable annotation?
options: To extract a value from the URL path
To deserialize the JSON body into a Java object
To set the base URL path for the controller
answer: To extract a value from the URL path

question: What is the purpose of the @Entity annotation?
options: To mark a class as a service component
To mark a class as a data-access component
To map a class to a database table
To extract a value from the URL path
answer: To map a class to a database table

question: What is the purpose of the @Autowired annotation?
options: To mark a class as a service component
To mark a class as a data-access component
To extract a value from the URL path
